subcodes.first_line: O herald of truth! Thy recent letter was received, and its contents were sweet and honeyed indeed. In truth, the cessation of news [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی حق نامه اخیر وصول یافت و مضامین شیرین و شکرین بود انقطاع اخبار فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
